content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (from Topic A's ICM-based autonomous agents) can be repurposed to dynamically prioritize what new information gets stored and retained in cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures, solving the pressing problem of catastrophic uncurated memory bloat. This framework turns agent memory from a passive storage buffer into an autonomous curator that only acquires and retains information that maximizes long-term learning efficiency.
